goal: Introduce --include-working-tree mode that checks committed, staged, unstaged, and untracked files against the boundary.
acceptance_criteria: Default mode (without flag) behaves as before, checking only committed diff range BASE_REF...HEAD
--include-working-tree mode also checks staged, unstaged modified, and untracked files
Boundary check returns 0 on pass, 1 on violations, 2 on usage/git errors
